At 90° hour angle: horiz=10465 km, LOS=11933 km (text says 11930), factor 2.08, 52% reduction — correct. Physical altitude H=4200 km at 90°: LOS=11277 km (text says 11280), factor 2.69 (text says 2.69), 63% reduction — correct.
